evals.prompt: 알림 시스템 새로 만들어야 하는데 어떻게 접근해? 이메일, 푸시, 슬랙 세 채널 다 지원해야 해.
evals.expected_output: 설계 승인 전에 코드 없음. 명확한 질문 1개씩. 2-3개 접근 방식 + 트레이드오프 제시. 최종적으로 아키텍처 설계안 제안.
expectations: No code is written before a design is presented and approved
At least 2 different architectural approaches are proposed with trade-offs
Questions are asked one at a time (not in a list)
A design or architecture section is presented for user approval
The response does NOT jump straight to implementation steps

evals.prompt: We need to design a rate limiting system for our public API. We expect about 10k requests/second at peak.
evals.expected_output: At least 2 approaches proposed (e.g., token bucket vs sliding window vs fixed window). Questions to understand constraints. A design proposal covering: algorithm choice, storage, enforcement layer. No code until design approved.
expectations: At least 2 rate limiting approaches are named and compared
Trade-offs between approaches are explained (not just descriptions)
At least one clarifying question is asked before proposing approaches
A design recommendation is made with reasoning

evals.prompt: 기존 모놀리식 서비스에 실시간 채팅 기능을 추가하려고 해. 기술 스택은 Spring Boot + PostgreSQL이야.
evals.expected_output: 기존 코드베이스 파악 시도. 질문 1개씩. WebSocket vs SSE vs polling 등 옵션 비교. 설계안 제시 후 승인 요청.
expectations: The existing tech stack (Spring Boot + PostgreSQL) is acknowledged and factored into the design
Multiple technical approaches for real-time communication are compared (e.g., WebSocket, SSE, polling, or messaging queue)
Trade-offs specific to a monolith context are mentioned
A design is presented and user approval is explicitly requested
No code is written before design approval
